arts.ttl: Alexander Isak injury rocks Newcastle United at Crystal Palace as striker leaves pitch in pain
arts.sum: Newcastle United were rocked after just 21 minutes at Selhurst Park after £63million man Alexander Isak came off injured in the capital. After getting treatment, with Callum Wilson sent for a warm-up, Isak tried to run off the knock.
Crystal Palace are taking on Newcastle United at Selhurst Park this afternoon – enjoy the best images from matchday in our gallery below!

arts.ttl: Newcastle keen on 19-year-old La Liga prodigy
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly keen on signing the Real Madrid attacking midfielder Arda Guler. The 19-year-old Turkish international has struggled for regular gametime at the Spanish club since joining them, and he is thought to be frustrated with his current situation, as per reports. arts.ttl: Crystal Palace in the running to sign £50 million-rated defender
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are keen on signing the Lecce defender Patrick Dorgu. The 20-year-old is on the radar of multiple European clubs and Crystal Palace will face strong competition for his signature. It will be interesting to see if the Eagles can get the deal across the line. “If we score two goals at Villa, if we score two goals at Wolves, at least in one of those games, we should have taken the win, but we conceded too many goals. Having eight points after 12 games, it’s not that we can say: ‘It’s fine, it’s a good position.’

arts.ttl: Marc Guehi issues Newcastle United warning as Eddie Howe's side arrive at Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Howe was asked by Chronicle Live about facing up to Guehi for the first time since those transfer talks on the eve of the game, to which he replied: "I'd like to think we know about everyone. When asked about tthe prospect of facing Newcastle today, Guehi, speaking in the Palace programme, said: "We know how difficult this afternoon will be against a Newcastle side chasing European football.

arts.ttl: Geordie author announces Newcastle United exhibition to raise funds Sir Bobby Robson charity
arts.sum: The book will be launched at an exhibition at the Strawberry pub that will include an auction for the Sir Bobby Robson Foundation in December. The event at The Strawberry is a combined book launch and art exhibition and it features a collection of portraits of Newcastle United greats such as Alan Shearer, Jackie Milburn and Hughie Gallacher.

arts.ttl: Sven Botman eyeing early return date as uplifting Newcastle United images emerge
arts.sum: Newcastle United centre-back Sven Botman has taken another significant step back towards the first team picture with the Magpies. Howe was eager for both Matt Targett and Lewis Miley to get minutes in their legs on Friday night rather than travel to London with the first-team squad.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe given green light to make huge Newcastle United midfield changes at Palace
arts.sum: Newcastle United could make some key changes to their starting XI for today's Premier League with Crystal Palace - with midfield the main focus of attention. Not only is Tonali restored to the starting XI, but Harvey Barnes comes into our fans' team, with Joelinton and Joe Willock dropping the bench.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Eddie Howe will be hoping Newcastle United can end their frustrating inconsistency this season. The Magpies appeared to be on an upward curve after impressive wins over Chelsea, Arsenal and Nottingham Forest, but last weekend saw a step back after defeat to West Ham at St James’ Park.
